info.title: Makerspace Manager API
info.description:
Multi-tenant makerspace hardware loan system.

Public flow: browse inventory, search with `q`, page with `page`, verify Check-In, submit a borrow request, then track it by public token or verified Check-In identifier.

Admin flow: authenticate with JWT, manage makerspaces, inventory, staff, QR labels, bulk imports, request review, issue, and return.

Authentication: staff/admin endpoints use `Authorization: Bearer <access>`. Public browser endpoints can use `X-Publishable-Key` when public key hardening is enabled.

get.description: List public inventory products for a public makerspace.

parameters.name: X-Publishable-Key
parameters.description: Public API key for a makerspace public client. Required when API_CLIENT_AUTH_REQUIRED is enabled.

parameters.description: Public makerspace code (for example TSEL) or slug.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

post.description:
Base for ALL staff endpoints: authenticated + active staff + auto-scoped queryset.

Future phases subclass this so the invariant 'every staff query is makerspace-scoped'
is enforced by default rather than by remembering to add a mixin (review fix #4). Add
`required_action` + `HasMakerspaceAction` to a subclass for per-action checks.

post.summary: Add QR code to print batch
Resolve QR target and scanner allowed actions

Takes a set of user credentials and returns an access and refresh JSON web
token pair to prove the authentication of those credentials.

post.description:
Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or replayed refresh token.

403.description: CSRF check failed or account restricted.

ContextEnum.description:
* `issue` - Issue
* `return` - Return
* `inventory_check` - Inventory Check
* `reassignment` - Reassignment
* `scanner_lookup` - Scanner Lookup

FrontendTypeEnum.description:
* `public_portal` - Public Portal
* `staff_admin` - Staff Admin
* `guest_handover` - Guest Handover
* `scanner` - Scanner
* `kiosk` - Kiosk
* `superadmin_console` - Superadmin Console
* `third_party` - Third Party

PrintRequestStatusEnum.description:
* `pending` - Pending
* `accepted` - Accepted
* `printing` - Printing
* `completed` - Completed
* `rejected` - Rejected
* `failed` - Failed

StaffMembershipRoleEnum.description:
* `space_manager` - Space Manager
* `guest_admin` - Guest Admin
* `inventory_manager` - Inventory Manager
* `print_manager` - Print Manager

StocktakeStatusEnum.description:
* `draft` - Draft
* `counting` - Counting
* `completed` - Completed
* `approved` - Approved
* `applied` - Applied
* `cancelled` - Cancelled

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

is_active.title: Active
is_active.description: Designates whether this user should be treated as active. Unselect this instead of deleting accounts.

UserRoleEnum.description:
* `superadmin` - Super Admin
* `space_manager` - Space Manager
* `guest_admin` - Guest Admin
* `requester` - Requester
